title: mentha × angustifolia
intro: Mentha × angustifolia, also known as Welsh mountain mint, is a hybrid species of mint that is native to the mountainous regions of Wales in the United Kingdom. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Mentha × angustifolia include its ability to ease nausea, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Mentha × angustifolia can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often used to promote digestion, relieve stress, and soothe sore muscles.
